activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Material UI structures the refund escalation record, but the surface still mixes manager triage with raw system diagnostics from the source brief.

surface.heading: Refund escalation triage

selected.request: Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
surface.policy: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.
actions: Return to support agent for receipt
surface.primary_action: Return to support agent for receipt

handoff.title: Missing receipt required
handoff.reason: Manager approval is allowed only when evidence is complete; the receipt photo is missing.
handoff.action: Collect the receipt photo and resubmit R-1842 for manager approval.
